title: gaillardia candelaria var. candelaria
intro: Gaillardia candelaria var. candelaria, commonly known as the gaillardia or firewheel, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Gaillardia candelaria var. candelaria include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a popular remedy for wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Gaillardia candelaria var. candelaria can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds, or ingested to promote overall well-being.
